properties.remark: Pinal Airpark reports visibility of less than 0.25 mile due to dust storm.

Reports of visibility as low as 200 yards on Highway 191 near Sunizona due to dust.

Corrects previous dust storm report from 26 E Willcox. Car crash reported on I-10 eastbound at mile post 373. Westbound lanes closed from Bowie to Lordsburg, NM.
Olga AZDOT weather station recorded visibilities below a half mile from 1pm to 140pm MST. Minimum visibility of 0.21 mi reached at 120 pm.
Corrects previous dust storm report from 12 NE Willcox. The eastbound lanes of Interstate 10 near Wilcox are closed due to blowing dust.
The westbound lanes of Interstate 10 near Wilcox are closed due to blowing dust.
APS reported a power outage was around 10 pm at the intersection of Richie Rd and Rochin Rd due to strong thunderstorm winds causing broken wires. Time estimated by radar.

Corrects previous report to change the event type from Flood to Flash Flood. Roads closed from North of Wiley Road on Calle Riconado to South Wentworth Road due to flooding. Flooding occurred within the the Missile Tank Basin of Pima County.
